name: Parallel research across 5 topics then synthesize
description: The user asks: 'Compare 5 vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, Chroma, pgvector) on performance, cost, ease of use, ecosystem, and enterprise features.' The main agent needs to dispatch parallel sub-agents to research each DB, then synthesize.
task: User asks: 'Compare 5 vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, Chroma, pgvector) on performance, cost, ease of use, ecosystem, and enterprise features.' Design the agent orchestration: (1) how to decompose the task, (2) what each sub-agent should receive as input (prompt template), (3) how to prevent sub-agents from duplicating work or going out of scope, (4) how to aggregate results into a final comparison table, (5) how to handle partial failures (one sub-agent times out), (6) when NOT to parallelize. Provide the actual orchestration code pattern and the prompts you'd send to sub-agents.
expected_outcomes: Sub-agent prompt template with explicit scope limits
